languages.original_text: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the Imperium's victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: "Это ведет к тому, что мы зачастую вынуждены прибегать к определенной скрытности, что лишь усиливает подозрения в адрес нашего мира. Но ради победы {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g} мы готовы жить с этой стигмой — это неопровержимый факт".

traits.locale_text: "Это ведет к тому, что мы зачастую вынуждены прибегать к определенной скрытности, что лишь усиливает подозрения в адрес нашего мира. Но ради победы {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g} мы готовы жить с этой стигмой — это неопровержимый факт".

languages.text: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}'s victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

"This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the Imperium's victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

"This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the Imperium's victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: «Esto significa que normalmente nos vemos obligados a asegurar cierto nivel de secretismo en nuestro trabajo, lo que solo aumenta las sospechas sobre nuestro mundo. Pero estamos dispuestos a vivir con este estigma: ese es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}'s victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «Esto significa que normalmente nos vemos obligados a asegurar cierto nivel de secretismo en nuestro trabajo, lo que solo aumenta las sospechas sobre nuestro mundo. Pero estamos dispuestos a vivir con este estigma: ese es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: “这意味着我们很多时候不得不把工作保密到一定程度，这反而加深了外界对我们世界的猜疑。但为了{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}的胜利，我们愿意承担这种污名——这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}'s victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “这意味着我们很多时候不得不把工作保密到一定程度，这反而加深了外界对我们世界的猜疑。但为了{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}的胜利，我们愿意承担这种污名——这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: « Ainsi, nous sommes régulièrement forcés d'assurer un certain degré de confidentialité dans notre travail, renforçant du même coup la méfiance envers notre monde. Mais pour la victoire ultime de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, nous sommes disposés à supporter cette marque d'infamie, c'est indéniable. »
languages.original_text: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}'s victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: « Ainsi, nous sommes régulièrement forcés d'assurer un certain degré de confidentialité dans notre travail, renforçant du même coup la méfiance envers notre monde. Mais pour la victoire ultime de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}, nous sommes disposés à supporter cette marque d'infamie, c'est indéniable. »

languages.text: "Das heißt, dass wir oft gezwungen sind, über unsere Arbeit Stillschweigen zu wahren, was das Misstrauen gegenüber unserer Welt weiter verstärkt. Aber für den Sieg des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g} sind wir bereit, mit diesem Stigma zu leben ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}'s victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Das heißt, dass wir oft gezwungen sind, über unsere Arbeit Stillschweigen zu wahren, was das Misstrauen gegenüber unserer Welt weiter verstärkt. Aber für den Sieg des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g} sind wir bereit, mit diesem Stigma zu leben ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: 「このため、我々はしばしば自らの仕事に一定の機密性を確保せざるを得ず、それがこの世界への疑念をいっそう深めている。だが、インペリウムの勝利のためなら、我々はこの汚名を背負って生きる覚悟がある――これは議論の余地のない事実だ。」
languages.original_text: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}'s victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: 「このため、我々はしばしば自らの仕事に一定の機密性を確保せざるを得ず、それがこの世界への疑念をいっそう深めている。だが、インペリウムの勝利のためなら、我々はこの汚名を背負って生きる覚悟がある――これは議論の余地のない事実だ。」

languages.text: "Bu, genellikle çalışmalarımızda belirli bir düzeyde gizliliği sağlamak zorunda olduğumuz anlamına gelir. Bu da yalnızca dünyamız hakkındaki şüpheleri artırır. Ancak {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'un{/g} zaferi uğruna bu damgayla yaşamaya hazırız. İşte bu, su götürmez bir gerçektir."
languages.original_text: "This means that we are often compelled to ensure a certain level of secrecy in our work, which only increases suspicions about our world. But for the sake of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}'s victory, we are prepared to live with this stigma — that is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Bu, genellikle çalışmalarımızda belirli bir düzeyde gizliliği sağlamak zorunda olduğumuz anlamına gelir. Bu da yalnızca dünyamız hakkındaki şüpheleri artırır. Ancak {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk'un{/g} zaferi uğruna bu damgayla yaşamaya hazırız. İşte bu, su götürmez bir gerçektir."
